title: Facelis retusa
intro: Facelis retusa, also known as bitter fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Facelis retusa has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe the digestive tract, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The bioactive constituents of Facelis retusa include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Facelis retusa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
